---
title: "Skills"
---

## Data Science

* R and RStudio     
  Packages include:
  + tidyverse
    - ggplot 2 
    - dplyr
    - tidyr
    - readr
    - purr 
    - tibble
    - stringr
    - forcats
  + knitr
  + reticulate
  + lubridate
  + dygraphs
  + sf (simple features)
  + leaflet
  + devtools
  + downloader
  + pagedown
* Python     
  Libraries include:
  + Pandas
  + Matplotlib
  + Numpy
  + Plotly
* SQL 
  + Oracle
  + MySQL
* Tableau
* Excel / Google Sheets
* Data Intuition and Insight    
  Topics including:
  + Numerical and Graphical Summaries
  + Measures of Spread
  + Normal Distribution and Z-scores
  + Probability  

## Computer Engineering

* Embedded Programming and Systems
  + C/C++ 
  + Python
  + Assembly
  + Register-level C 
* Digital Systems
  + Verilog
  + VHDL
  + FPGA 
    - Artix 7
    - Kintex-7
    - PolarFire
  + Simulation
    - Verilog Test Bench
    - Logisim
* Real Time Operating Systems
  + ROS (Robot Operating System)
  + VxWorks
  + FreeRTOS 
* Internet of Things
  + Communications
  + Information
  + Fourier Series and Transform
  + Filters
* Circuit Analysis
  + LTspice Software
  + Transistors, Diodes, and Op-Amps
    - MOSFETS
    - BJT
  + Basic Circuits
    - Inductors
    - Capacitors 
    - Resistors

## Web Development

* HTML
* CSS
<!-- * Javascript -->
* YAML and Rmd     
  Basic building blocks:
  + knitr (R package)
  + _site.yml
  + index.Rmd
  
## Mathematics

* MATLAB
* Mathematica
* Python
  + Functional
  + Mathematical
* Discrete Math 
  + Elisp
  + Erlang
* Calculus and Linear Algebra  

## Programming

* C/C++
* Java - Android Studio
  
## Operating Systems

* Linux
* Microsoft Windows
  + Active Directory
* Command lines 
  + Bash
  + Batch

## Industry Knowledge

* Technical Communication
* Human Relations
* Project Management
  + Agile
  + Scrum
  + Waterfall
* Git
  + Github
  + Bash
* Security  
  + Social Engineering
  + Cryptography
  + Data and Networks 
  + Authentication, Access and Accounts
